items.title: Man accused of breaking into Maricopa County Medical Examiner's Office, committing sexual acts

items.title: Walmart warns US shoppers are cutting spending as higher gas prices bite
items.dek: The retail giant said it expects customers to cut back in the coming months due to higher gas prices.
items.body: The retail giant said it expects customers to cut back in the coming months due to higher gas prices.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel as backlash over treatment grows
items.dek: On Thursday, the UK confirmed it had summoned Israel's top diplomat in Britain to express its "condemnation" of the incident.
items.body: On Thursday, the UK confirmed it had summoned Israel's top diplomat in Britain to express its "condemnation" of the incident.
